# click-shell

{{ TravisCI }} {{ DocsStatus }}

click-shell is an extension to [click] that easily turns your click app into a shell utility.
It is built on top of the built in python [cmd] module, with modifications to make it work with click.

## Features

- Adds a "shell" mode **with command completion** to any click app
- Just a one line change for most click apps

## Usage

Simply replace `@click.group` with `@click_shell.shell` on the root level command:

```python
from click_shell import shell

# @click.group()  # no longer
@shell(prompt='my-app > ', intro='Starting my app...')
def my_app():
    pass

@my_app.command()
def testcommand():
    print('testcommand is running')

# more commands

if __name__ == '__main__':
    my_app()
```

When run, you should expect an output like so:

```bash
$ python my_app.py
Starting my app...
my-app > testcommand
testcommand is running
my-app >
```

:::{note}
It should be noted that this decorator **only** alters functionality if no arguments are
passed on the command line. If you try to run a command directly
(like `python my_app.py the_command` in the above example), your app will function
identically to how it did before.
:::

For more advanced usage, check out our docs at <https://click-shell.readthedocs.io/>

[click]: http://click.pocoo.org/
[cmd]: https://docs.python.org/2/library/cmd.html

modules.name: click_shell
documentation:
click-shell

An extension to click that easily turns your click app into a shell utility

functions.name: click_shell._compat.get_choices
documentation: This is identical to click._bashcomplete:get_choices in click 6.4+

modules.name: click_shell._cmd
documentation:
click_shell._cmd

This module overrides the builtin python cmd module

classes.name: click_shell._cmd.ClickCmd

methods.name: click_shell._cmd.ClickCmd.cmdloop
documentation: We need to override this to fix readline

A simple wrapper around the builtin python cmd module that:
1) makes completion work on OSX
2) uses a history file
3) uses click.echo instead of std*.write()
4) turns Cmd into a new-style python object :)

modules.name: click_shell.decorators
documentation:
click_shell.decorators

Decorators to make using click_shell simpler and more similar to click.

functions.name: click_shell.decorators.shell
documentation:
Creates a new {class}`Shell` with a function as callback. This
works otherwise the same as {func}`command` just that the `cls`
parameter is set to {class}`Shell`.

functions.name: click_shell.core.get_invoke
documentation:
Get the Cmd main method from the click command
\:param command: The click Command object
\:return: the do\_\* method for Cmd
\:rtype: function

functions.name: click_shell.core.get_help
documentation:
Get the Cmd help function from the click command
\:param command: The click Command object
\:return: the help\_\* method for Cmd
\:rtype: function

functions.name: click_shell.core.get_complete
documentation:
Get the Cmd complete function for the click command
\:param command: The click Command object
\:return: the complete\_\* method for Cmd
\:rtype: function
